name: defi_yield
description: Discover yield opportunities across Base DeFi protocols. Returns APY, TVL, risk level, and deposit details for lending, liquidity pools, and vaults. Supports Aerodrome, Morpho, Aave, and more.

token.description: Token symbol or address to find yields for. Optional — omit for top yields across all tokens.

amount.description: Amount to deploy (for projected earnings). Optional.
